messages.content: Hey! I love your neo-traditional work. I've been thinking about getting a rose piece on my forearm.
Thanks! I'd love to work on that. Do you have any reference images or specific ideas in mind?
I've been saving some references! Something with bold lines and vibrant colors.
Love that style! I can definitely do something similar. Let me sketch out a quick concept.
That design looks perfect! I'd love to book a session. Do you have anything available before the new year?
I have Dec 28th at 2pm available! Here's the booking details:
Hi! I'm interested in getting a floral sleeve piece. I've seen your work and love your style!
Would you be available for a consultation to discuss ideas?
Hey! I'll be visiting your city in March and would love to do a guest spot at your studio.
Hi! I wanted to follow up on the design we discussed last week.
Here's the updated sketch with the changes we discussed. Let me know what you think!
This is exactly what I was hoping for! The shading looks amazing.
Thanks for the session! The tattoo healed perfectly. Really happy with how it turned out.
So glad to hear that! It was a pleasure working with you. Feel free to reach out if you want to add to it!
Your deposit has been confirmed. See you on the 15th!
Perfect, thank you! Looking forward to it. Should I bring anything specific?
Just make sure to stay hydrated and eat a good meal before the session. See you soon!
Hi Jane! I've been admiring your geometric work. Would you be interested in designing a piece for my back?
I'd love to! Geometric back pieces are some of my favorites. What size are you thinking?
I'm thinking full back, something really bold and symmetrical.
That sounds amazing! Let's schedule a consultation to go over ideas. I have availability next week.
Hey! I saw your availability opened up for next month. Would love to finally get that piece we talked about!
Yes! I was just thinking about that design. I still have it saved. Want me to send you the updated version?
Please! I'm so excited to finally make this happen.
Hi Alice! I'm planning a guest spot tour through the US. Would your studio be interested in hosting?
We'd love to have you! When were you thinking?
I was looking at April or May. I can bring my own equipment and clientele.
April would work great for us. Let me check with the team and get back to you with dates.
Michael, I love the initial sketch but was wondering if we could make the lines a bit thicker?
Absolutely! Thicker lines will hold up better over time too. I'll revise and send you version 2.
You're the best! No rush, whenever you have time.
Hi Levvy! Just confirming our appointment for tomorrow at 10am?
Confirmed! See you then. Remember to get a good night's sleep!
Will do! Can't wait!
William! Your colorful work is incredible. I want something tropical for my leg.
Thank you! Tropical themes are so fun to work on. Are you thinking flowers, birds, or a mix?
A mix! Maybe hibiscus flowers with a bird of paradise?
Perfect combination! The colors will pop beautifully together. Let's book a consultation!
